title: Opening for Medical Officer at BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited:
BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital Advisory Limited!
